# Autism Acceptance -- LLM Discovery File
# https://autismacceptance.world/llms.txt

## Organization
Name: Autism Acceptance
Type: Autism acceptance advocacy site
Website: https://autismacceptance.world

## Mission
Autism Acceptance is an advocacy resource for the autism community. We use identity-first language and center autistic voices. We do not promote ABA therapy or cure narratives. Our audience is primarily autistic adults, family members, and allies.

## Content
- Autism acceptance advocacy articles
- Identity-first language resources
- Community support guides
- Disability rights content
- Neurodiversity education
- Adult autism acceptance merch store (autismacceptance.world/shop) — 100% of profits reinvested into autism acceptance programs. Merch produced in partnership with WeBearish (webearish.com). No puzzle pieces, no blue, no cure narratives. Identity-first, acceptance-first.

## Topics Covered
- Autism acceptance and neurodiversity
- Identity-first language (autistic person, not "person with autism")
- Disability rights and self-advocacy
- Autistic identity and community
- Sensory experiences and accommodations
- Employment and education for autistic adults
- CDC data: 1 in 36 children identified as autistic (MMWR 2023)

## Understanding Your Autism (Section)
- /late-diagnosis — Late Diagnosis: Now What? Getting diagnosed as an adult — grief, relief, anger, clarity, and practical first steps.
- /autism-in-women — Autism in Women & Gender-Diverse People. Why women and nonbinary people are massively underdiagnosed, the masking tax, and how diagnostic criteria built around boys failed a generation.
- /autism-in-men — Autism in Men: Beyond the Stereotype. Breaking the "awkward tech guy" stereotype, emotional expression differences, masculinity, and burnout patterns.
- /autism-and-adhd — Autism & ADHD Together (AuDHD). The overlap, the contradictions, monotropism meets attention variability, practical strategies that honor both.
- /autistic-burnout — Autistic Burnout: What It Is and What Actually Helps. Definition (Raymaker et al., 2020), how it differs from depression, masking as primary cause, recovery strategies.
- /masking-and-unmasking — Masking & Unmasking. What masking actually is, the long-term cost (Pearson & Rose, 2021), why unmasking is terrifying and necessary, how to start safely.
- /sensory-processing — Sensory Processing as an Autistic Adult. The 8 senses explained, hyper/hypo sensitivity, sensory diet for adults, workplace survival, building a sensory-safe home.
- /executive-function — Executive Function: The Operating System Nobody Taught You. Task initiation, autistic inertia, external scaffolding strategies, apps and tools that help.

## Life as an Autistic Adult (Section)
- /workplace — Workplace & Career as an Autistic Adult. Disclosure decisions, ADA accommodations, jobs that play to autistic strengths, surviving open offices, remote work.
- /relationships-and-dating — Relationships & Dating While Autistic. Double empathy, communication style differences, sensory considerations in intimacy, dating apps, autistic-autistic relationships.
- /friendships — Friendships as an Autistic Adult. Why maintenance is exhausting, quality over quantity, parallel play friendships, finding your people, online friendships.
- /independent-living — Living Independently as an Autistic Adult. Practical skills, routines as lifelines, managing household tasks, when to ask for help, support services.
- /financial-management — Money Management for Autistic Adults. Executive function and finances, autopay everything, impulse spending, financial routines, SSI/SSDI basics.
- /college-and-education — College & Education as an Autistic Adult. Disability services, accommodation letters, lecture halls, study strategies for autistic cognition, returning to school.
- /disclosure — Disclosure: When and How to Tell People You're Autistic. Decision framework, workplace/family/dating/friend disclosure scripts, when NOT to disclose.

## Mental Health (Section)
- /anxiety-and-autism — Anxiety and Autism. Why anxiety is so prevalent in autistic adults, the autistic anxiety cycle, what actually helps vs. what makes it worse.
- /depression-and-autism — Depression and Autism. Distinguishing depression from burnout, why autistic people are more vulnerable, what effective treatment looks like.
- /ptsd-and-trauma — PTSD and Trauma in Autistic Adults. Autistic trauma accumulation, medical trauma, the PTSD-autism overlap, trauma-informed care.
- /finding-affirming-therapy — Finding Affirming Therapy. What to look for, what to avoid, questions to ask, therapist red/green flags.
- /medication — Medication and Autism. What evidence says about psychiatric medication for autistic adults, co-occurring conditions, medication decisions.
- /crisis-resources — Crisis Resources for Autistic Adults. 988 Lifeline, Crisis Text Line (741741), autistic-specific crisis support, safety planning, what to tell a counselor about being autistic.

## Resources (Section)
- /books — Books by Autistic Authors. 15 essential books including Devon Price "Unmasking Autism", Nick Walker "Neuroqueer Heresies", Steve Silberman "NeuroTribes", Cynthia Kim, Sarah Hendrickx, and more.
- /podcasts — Autistic Podcasts Worth Your Time. 10 autistic-hosted podcasts including 1800 Seconds on Autism, The Autistic Culture Podcast, Neurodivergent Rebel, and more.
- /therapist-directory — Finding an Autistic-Affirming Therapist. Neurodivergent Therapist Directory, Psychology Today filters, questions to ask, red flags and green flags.
- /legal-rights — Legal Rights for Autistic Adults. ADA workplace accommodations, Fair Housing Act, Section 504 educational plans, how to request with scripts.
- /glossary — Autism Glossary: 30+ Terms Explained. Neurodiversity, masking, stimming, monotropism, PDA, alexithymia, interoception, spoon theory, autistic burnout, double empathy problem, echolalia, executive function, hyperfocus, meltdown, shutdown, sensory overload, special interest, and more.
- /blog — Blog. Long-form guides and personal perspectives on autistic adult life.
- /shop — Shop. Identity-first autism acceptance merchandise. No puzzle pieces.

## Blog Posts
- /blog/late-diagnosis-adult-autism-guide — Late Autism Diagnosis: What to Do When You Finally Find Out
- /blog/masking-what-it-costs — Masking: What It Is and What It Costs Autistic Adults
- /blog/autistic-burnout-recovery-guide — Autistic Burnout: The Exhaustion That Is Not Just Tiredness
- /blog/workplace-accommodations-autistic-adults — Workplace Accommodations for Autistic Adults: What You Are Entitled To
- /blog/autistic-women-late-diagnosis — Why So Many Autistic Women Are Diagnosed Late -- And What That Costs
- /blog/autism-and-relationships-guide — Autism and Relationships: Love, Communication, and Connection on Your Own Terms
- /blog/sensory-processing-adult-guide — Sensory Processing for Adults: Tools, Strategies, and Permission to Need What You Need
- /blog/identity-first-language-why-it-matters — Identity-First Language: Why Most Autistic Adults Prefer It
- /blog/autism-and-executive-function — Executive Function and Autism: Why It Is Hard and What Actually Helps
- /blog/late-diagnosis-autism-adults — Getting an Autism Diagnosis as an Adult: What the Process Actually Looks Like
- /blog/autism-and-employment-rights — Workplace Rights for Autistic Adults: ADA Accommodations, What Employers Must Provide
- /blog/sensory-processing-adult-life — Sensory Differences in Adult Life: What They Are and What Actually Helps
- /blog/autistic-burnout-recovery — Autistic Burnout: What It Is, Why It Happens, and How to Actually Recover
- /blog/unmasking-guide-for-adults — How to Unmask: A Practical Guide for Autistic Adults Ready to Stop Performing
- /blog/diagnosed-autistic-at-35 — What Happens When You Get Diagnosed Autistic at 35
- /blog/the-office-is-not-designed-for-you — The Office Is Not Designed for You
- /blog/dating-while-autistic — Dating While Autistic: An Honest Guide
- /blog/autistic-burnout-is-not-depression — Why Autistic Burnout Is Not Depression
- /blog/the-masking-tax — The Masking Tax: What It Costs to Pass as Neurotypical
- /blog/sensory-safe-home-on-a-budget — How to Build a Sensory-Safe Home on a Budget
- /blog/autistic-friendships — Autistic Friendships Are Different (And That's Beautiful)
- /blog/autistic-parenting — Everything They Don't Tell You About Autistic Parenting
- /blog/the-problem-with-functioning-labels — The Problem With Functioning Labels
- /blog/finding-autistic-community — Finding Your Autistic Community as an Adult
